title: Smaller Sword
description: This texture pack makes swords smaller, but it's not the same as the dagger sword pack.
body:
# Smaller Swords
This texture pack makes all swords appear smaller on your screen, giving you a cleaner view in PvP and Survival while keeping the game’s original vanilla style. Unlike dagger-style packs, this version simply reduces sword size without changing their look or feel, making it perfect for players who want clarity without losing the Minecraft vibe.

## Compatibility
- Tested on: 1.21.6 – 1.20 (Main version: 1.21+)
- Other versions: Not tested

## Requirements
- **No mods required**. Works on vanilla Minecraft.

## Credits
- Pack created by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
